lyrics.text: You're a man without a backbone
I see you're looking for a window
lyrics.translation: 我看你想找个地缝钻进去吧

lyrics.text: You really think you're something special
And think you're hot but acting so cold
lyrics.translation: 以为自己很性感很酷吗

lyrics.text: That rock 'n rock don't really loose my soul

lyrics.text: You're a budget Elvis Costello
lyrics.translation: 你就是个超低配的猫王

lyrics.text: Baby, you deserve a medal
lyrics.translation: 小伙子我真想给你发个奖牌

lyrics.text: For being number one asshole
Stop wasting my time
Even on the cover of GQ
I am never going home with you
lyrics.translation: 老娘也不会和你回家的

lyrics.text: A leather jacket don't impress me

lyrics.text: I'm not a fool
I'm not a fool
I'm kinda different to the girl-next-door

lyrics.text: I'm looking for something more

lyrics.translation: 你也就在你的地盘风光风光

lyrics.text: Over me you bear no power
